top_signals.title: Milky Mist Said to Launch $213 Million India IPO This Month
top_signals.summary: Milky Mist Dairy Food Ltd. is gearing up to launch its 20.35 billion rupees ($213 million) initial public offering as early as July, according to people familiar with the matter, paving the way for what is expected to be India’s largest dairy-sector IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Build a Palestinian State
top_signals.summary: Fulfill the promise of self-determination and stabilize the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korea's SK Hynix to Make US Debut; Japan Urges Pensions to Invest More at Home | The Pulse 7/10/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Marina Zavolock, Morgan Stanley Chief European Equity Strategist; Phoenix Kalen, SocGen CIB Global Head of Emerging Markets Research ; Carlos Cuerpo, Spanish Economy Minister   (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.summary: The continent must overcome its Russia predicament.
